import { useState } from 'react'; import React from 'react'; import './Cahrc.css'; import CH1 from '../../Assets/carbide-dead-centers-.webp'; import CH2 from '../../Assets/carbide-half-dead-centers.webp'; import CH3 from '../../Assets/hobbing-fixture-sleeves-.webp'; export const Cahrc = () => { const [r1, setR1] = useState(true); const [r2, setR2] = useState(false); const [r3, setR3] = useState(false); const clkHnd1 = () => { setR1(true); setR2(false); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd2 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(true); setR3(false); }; return (
{r1 &&
Name Detail
Application/Usage Industrial
Usage/Application Industrial
Material of Tool Solid Carbide
location pune
color silver
type new

Product Decription

Professionals work hard and in close coordination to provide best range of Carbide Dead Centers. This dead center is accurate in size and superior in finishing. This presented metallic product is easy to install in different machines. This center has excellent finishing and longer life.

Features

  • Different sizest
  • Durable
  • Easy to install
} {r2 &&
Name Detail
Matrial EN31 , D2 , HSS
Shape various
Type CONICAL
Usage/Application Industrial Grinding machines
Country of Origin Made in INDIA
Location Pune

Product Decription

We are keenly engaged in offering reliable Carbide Half Dead Centers. This presented half dead center is reliable and accessible from us in various specifications. Moreover to this, these presented carbide centers are light in weight and supplied to patrons after proper inspection.

Features

  • Rust free
  • Reliable
  • Pressure resistant
}
) } export default Cahrc
